Robin DR400/180 - 1/5 share based at Derby

7 Robin DR400/180 Regent 1976

Forming a new 5 share group in a very well maintained and extensively refurbished IFR Robin DR400 Regent based at Derby Airfield. Garmin avionics, leather interior, hangared and engineer maintained. £20,000 share, £200/month, £130/hr wet. A fast, economical and capable touring aircraft with excellent availability expected.

£20,000 1/5 share
Views: 382 Last Refresh: 12-Apr-26
View

Tiger Moth For Sale

9 DH82A 1942

For sale: a 1942 DH82A Tiger Moth (G-ALNA) for £80,000. Key features include a Gipsy Major 1 engine with 606 hours since overhaul, new Ceconite 102 fabric on wings and tail (2019), and an Icom 8.33 radio. Airframe hours are 7650. The aircraft has a current Certificate of Airworthiness until 27/3/25 and is hangared at Derby Airfield. Empty weight 1243 lbs, MTW 1825 lbs. Conventional instruments.

£80,000
Views: 1078 Last Refresh: 11-Apr-26
View

G-AVUS PA28-140 Cherokee | Dual Garmin G5 | £35K Avionics

5 Piper PA28-140 Cherokee 1967

Reduced for quick sale. PA28-140 Cherokee with dual Garmin G5, GNS 430, upgraded transponder and refurbished interior. Approx £35k avionics spend. Custom all-black scheme. Ex-flying school, rigorous maintenance, no deferred defects. Based Blackpool (EGNH). Turn-key ready.

£56,995
Views: 810 Last Refresh: 11-Apr-26
View

Miles M38 Messenger 2A for sale

10 M38 2A 1946

Offered for sale is a rare Miles M38 Messenger 2A, one of only six believed to be flying. This 1946 British-made aircraft seats four and is capable of operating from short airstrips while cruising at 100 knots. It has a continuous history with logbooks dating back to its first flights. The aircraft underwent a complete overhaul and military Mk4 appearance conversion. Notably, it was associated with Field Marshal Montgomery. A large spares package and full covers are included. Priced at £75,000.

£75,000
Views: 1008 Last Refresh: 10-Apr-26
View

Robin HR200/100 Club

16

Exceptional opportunity! A meticulously maintained aircraft is for sale in South West England. Manufacturer and model are undisclosed, but its pristine condition reflects rigorous upkeep. This versatile, dependable aircraft offers significant potential for various uses. Contact us for viewing and full specifications. Price upon request. Serious inquiries only.

£39,995
Views: 715 Last Refresh: 7-Apr-26
View

Sequoia Falco F8L

4 Falco F8L 1996

A rare 1996 Sequoia Falco F8L, UK registered (G-OCAD), known as the 'Ferrari of the skies,' is for sale. It cruises at over 160 knots with excellent handling. This specific aircraft features a Garmin glass cockpit, electronic ignition, and other enhancements. It has a robust construction, +6g -3g capability and can operate from short runways (500m landing, 200m take-off). It features a Lycoming IO-320-B1A engine (160hp), Hartzell propeller, Garmin avionics (G3X EFIS, G5 standby, GNC 507 autopilot), and numerous enhancements including electronic circuit breaker, PilotAware, LED lighting, and more. Airframe: 1015 hrs, Engine: 1300hrs TT.

£125,000 Or Nearest Offer
Views: 1562 Last Refresh: 5-Apr-26
View

Vans RV10 (Project - 80% Complete)

12 Vans Aircraft RV10 2019

Rare opportunity to acquire a substantially completed (80%) Vans RV-10 project. Built by experienced hands, featuring completed wings and empennage, advanced fuselage, Lycoming IO-540 engine (500 hrs since overhaul), Dynon SkyView HDX, Garmin GTN 355, and more. Requires propeller, interior trim, panel installation, and exterior paint to complete. Significant savings compared to completed RV-10s.

£180,000 Or Nearest Offer
Views: 955 Last Refresh: 4-Apr-26
View

Cessna F172M

12 Reims Cessna F172

First to see this stunning aircraft will buy! This aircraft has to be measured against the cost of a new Cessna 172S, as it is in 'like new' condition. On that basis, when considering that a new C172S is not currently available for delivery from Textron until 2028 and that this aircraft is available to purchase at less than half of the cost of a new model - it presents a unique opportunity that would be hard to replicate at this level.

£158,000 Or Nearest Offer
Views: 888 Last Refresh: 4-Apr-26
View

Sportcruiser for sale. Rotax engine and LAA permit

6 CZAW Sportcruiser 2009

CZAW Sportcruiser for sale with only 455 hours total time. Features a Rotax 912 ULS 100 HP engine with recent inspections. Equipped with a Woodcomp Klassic 3-blade propeller, Kanardia Horis 80 EFIS, Garmin GTR225A VHF radio, and GTX 328 transponder. Includes wingtip strobes, navigation lights, and a 12V outlet. LAA permit valid until July 2026. Aircraft is hangered.

£67,000
Views: 1510 Last Refresh: 4-Apr-26
View

Piper PA32R-300 Lance I - US Registered - Vat Paid

6 Piper LANCE 1 1976

This 1976 Piper PA32R-300 Lance I is a well-maintained, US-registered aircraft with VAT paid. Key features include a full IR, 6 seat with an additional small jump seat configuration for a total of 7 seats, and consistent hangarage. It boasts a fully overhauled engine in 2010 (546.06 SMOH), and more recently, propeller, and magnetos. Avionics are modern, featuring dual Garmin 430W Nav/Coms, a Sandel SN3308 Digital HSI, Garmin 795, and a JPI 710 digital engine monitor. The aircraft also has a new Airtex leather interior, new seatbelts, and new windscreens.

£142,500
Views: 725 Last Refresh: 2-Apr-26
View

Savannah G-CCXP

13 ICP Savannah 22

ySavannah G-CCXP for sale! ?25K, or ver Permit to June '26. New engine (120h), Pilotaware, Trig radio/Mode S, AV Map EFIS, MGL Avionics. Electric carb heat, strobe/nav lights. Hangared, prop refurbished '23. Spares. Easy STOL. Upgraded. 07879456019.

£25,000 or nearest offer

Cirrus SR20 Share For Sale Leeds East

5 Cirrus SR20 21

For sale: a share in a well-equipped Cirrus SR20 based at Leeds East. Highlights include a recent CAPS rocket & parachute replacement (2023), Avidyne avionics (IFD440s, DFC90 autopilot, PFD/MFD), and a friendly, established 9-person syndicate with two CRIs for transition training. Performance: 143 KTAS at 8.9 GPH. Costs: £18,000 for the share, £100/month fixed, £150/hour dry. Ideal for UK and European touring. Preference for experienced pilots with IMC/IR.

£18,000
Views: 746 Last Refresh: 27-Mar-26
View

24 Bellanca Citabria 7GCBC 1979

No summary

£87,000.00 GBP
Views: 1492 Last Refresh: 23-Mar-26
View

PITTS MODEL 12 - STUNNING

17 Pitts Model 12

This Pitts Model 12 is a late-specification aircraft with a shorter fuselage, larger ailerons, and is in superb condition. It features dual controls, interchangeable canopies, Hooker harnesses, and braided Aeroquip hoses. The aircraft has low hours (138 on the airframe, 152 on the engine) and was completed in 2017. Avionics include Trig VHF/Transponder, Kanardia AIA/GPS/IAS/Altimeter, and a GNS 2000 GPS. It boasts a Vendenyev M14PF engine (426 HP), MTV-9-250 propeller, carbon fiber seats, a smoke system, and a lightweight build (699kg). LAA permit valid until April 2027. No VAT.

£175,000 - Exchange considered.
Views: 1730 Last Refresh: 22-Mar-26
View

6 Auster J5L AIGLET TRAINER

All Offers considered, around £27k
Views: 2035 Last Refresh: 17-Mar-26
View

Piper PA28-180 Cherokee

13 1968

A well-maintained 1968 Piper PA28-180 Cherokee (G-CBMO) is offered for sale by Wilco Aviation, based at Teesside International Airport and available to view by appointment. Privately owned throughout its life and never used for flight training, the aircraft is in excellent condition and represents a strong example of the reliable Cherokee series. Powered by a Lycoming O-360 (180 hp) engine with 325 hours since overhaul, the aircraft cruises at 120 knots and carries 182 litres of fuel. It features a grey leather interior (9/10) and white/navy exterior (8/10), along with modern avionics including an Avidyne IFD440 NAV/COM/GPS, Garmin GTR205 COM, and dual Garmin G5 displays. With 2,778 airframe hours, valid ARC and Annual until July 2026, and strong engine compression readings, this Cherokee offers a reliable touring aircraft with excellent payload capability. Price: £80,000.

£80,000.00 GBP
Views: 1925 Last Refresh: 13-Mar-26
View

7 CESSNA 150M 1976

Cessna 150M - £69500.00. Refurbished 2022 (high standard, post-taxi incident). Zero-timed engine (Norvic, 170hrs), new Sensenich prop. Paint (Murray Flint) outstanding. Airframe: 7274 hrs. Day/Night/IMC approved. Annual: Oct '26. Ext: 10/10, Int: 7/10. Owned by pilots. Sleap, Shropshire. Genuine enquiries only.

14 Autocrat

Auster 5J1 Autocrat G-AJRB (1947), Sywell Aerodrome history. Cirrus Minor II (100hp), zero timed '01, rebuilt '10 (103 hrs). Hordern Richmond prop (10 hrs since overhaul). Rebuilt '08, refreshed '22. Trig Radio/Transponder, Pilot Aware. Permit to fly: July 2026. Eshott, Northumberland. ?25,000.

DH82a Tiger Moth For Sale

5 DeHavilland DH82a 1936

For sale: a meticulously maintained 1936 DeHavilland DH82a Tiger Moth (G-ADPC). It features a Gipsy Major 1 engine with 1050 hours since a complete overhaul of both the engine and airframe. A new Hoffman propeller was fitted in 2022. The aircraft is equipped with an Icom 8.33 radio and conventional Tiger Moth instruments. The Certificate of Airworthiness is valid until April 3, 2025. It is hangared at Derby Airfield. Priced at £75,000.

£75,000

Fournier RF3 for sale

6 Alpavia RF3

For sale: Fournier RF3 (G-ATBP), built in 1965. Features a Rectimo 4 AR 1200 engine (1390cc upgrade) with 1138 hours. Airframe has 3192 hours. Last flown in March 2023 due to medical reasons. Hangared in Easter Ross, Scotland. Comes with a current ARC valid until October 2026. Includes YAESU FTA-550L transceiver, David Clark H10-40 headset, GARMIN GPS III PILOT, and Fast FIND 220 PLB. Priced at £13,000. Contact 07708433001.

£130,000
Views: 517 Last Refresh: 10-Apr-26
View

Nord 854 (G-NORD)

14 NORD 854

Classic 1949 SNCAN Nord 854 (G-NORD) with low airframe hours (3150). The Continental A65 engine has 276 hours since a top-end overhaul and 50 hours since a bottom-end overhaul. The propeller and Bendix Mags both have 50 hours since overhaul. New harness and plugs fitted. Modern avionics including a Trig TY91 comm and TT21 xpdr installed in 2021. Reskinned in ceconite and painted in 2017. Permit valid until 01/07/2026. Cruise at 63mph with 2.5-3 hours endurance. Includes 20kg luggage capacity. Hangared at Dunkeswell.

£23,000
Views: 452 Last Refresh: 10-Apr-26
View

Cessna 152

5 Cessna 152 Taildragger 1979

This Cessna 152 Taildragger is in super condition and ready to fly. Key selling points include its recent annual inspection, low engine hours since the 2015 overhaul (468 hours), a relatively new Sensenich prop (405 hours), and included Garmin GNC255A. It also comes with new, uninstalled seats and a vortex generator kit.

£55,000

2008 Cirrus SR20 GTS G3

8 Cirrus SR20

2008 Cirrus SR20 G3 GTS, G-OAWM, 1,976 TT, Dual GTN 650, DFC90, IFR, CAPS to 2028, UK A very well presented and well-equipped 2008 Cirrus SR20 G3 GTS, G-OAWM offers impressive IFR capability, desirable factory features, and proven touring performance. Robin HR200/100 for sale

0

Exceptional 1974 Robin HR200/100 (G-BETD), £39995 ono. Low airframe (3190 hrs) & engine (389 hrs since overhaul) times. Meticulously maintained, arguably the finest in the UK (Henstridge based). Valid CofA/ARC until March 2027. Modern avionics include Trig TY96 transceiver (8.33 spaced) & Garmin GTX 328 transponder. Excellent condition. Owner selling due to shared ownership plans. Contact Wilco Aviation for details.

£39,995 ONO

Buy & Sell Light Aircraft in the UK & Europe

Welcome to AFORS, the premier independent marketplace for light aircraft for sale. Since 1999, we have connected thousands of pilots, syndicates, and flight schools with high-quality GA (General Aviation) aircraft. Whether you are looking for a reliable Cessna 150/152 for hour building, a Piper Cherokee for touring, or a classic taildragger for farm strip flying, our classifieds are updated daily by real owners and brokers.

Beyond complete airframes, you can also browse our listings for light aircraft shares, groups, and dedicated maintenance services. Filter by manufacturer, age, and price to find the perfect single-engine piston (SEP) aircraft for your flying needs.

AFORS

Aircraft For Sale

Afors is a dedicated aviation marketplace for new and used aircraft, helping both private and commercial aviation. Online since 1999, it has passionately evolved since then and has become the go-to place for listing and searching for a wide range of aircraft, from light aircraft and microlights to helicopters and larger planes.

AFORS also features listings for aircraft parts, engines, avionics, hangarage, and every other aviation services and items. Serving the UK, European and Global markets.

Site Map
